kanban_integration.notes: Hermes v0.13.0 kanban plugin — multi-agent board

goal_ralph_loop.notes: Hermes v0.13.0 /goal Ralph Loop — first-class goal tracking

cron_no_agent.notes: Hermes v0.13.0 cron --no-agent mode — pure background automation

full_autonomy.notes: FULL AUTONOMY granted by Bos 2026-05-09 — no approval gates

context_refs.description: Hermes @-syntax inline injection — @file, @folder, @diff, @staged, @git:N, @url. Inject file contents, directory trees, git changes, and web content directly into messages.

acp_editor_integration.description: Hermes ACP (Agent Client Protocol) — VS Code, Zed, JetBrains integration via stdio JSON-RPC. Run ILMA inside editors as coding assistant.

api_server_openai.description: Hermes API Server — OpenAI-compatible HTTP endpoint at port 8642. POST /v1/chat/completions (stateless) and /v1/responses (stateful with previous_response_id). SSE streaming with tool progress.
api_server_openai.note: API_SERVER_KEY auth, CORS support, Open WebUI/LobeChat compatible

batch_processing_rl.description: Hermes batch_runner.py — parallel RL training data generation with checkpointing, toolset distributions, ShareGPT-format trajectories. JSONL dataset support.
batch_processing_rl.note: num_workers, max_turns, provider routing, quality filtering, statistics

event_hooks_gateway.description: Hermes 3-tier event hooks — Gateway (HOOK.yaml+handler.py), Plugin (ctx.register_hook), Shell (config.yaml hooks:). 8 event types with wildcard support.
event_hooks_gateway.note: Non-blocking, wildcard support, BOOT.md pattern for startup checklists

checkpoints_rollback.description: Hermes Checkpoints v2 — shadow git repos for filesystem safety, automatic snapshots on file changes, /rollback with diff preview, configurable retention.
checkpoints_rollback.note: hermes checkpoint, hermes rollback --diff, auto-prune, exclude_patterns

memory_providers_external.description: Hermes 8 external memory providers — Honcho, OpenViking, Mem0, Hindsight, Holographic, RetainDB, ByteRover, Supermarket. Plugin architecture, semantic search.
memory_providers_external.note: API-based, self-hosted options, semantic search vs built-in keyword

mcp_integration.description: Hermes MCP (Model Context Protocol) — stdio and HTTP MCP server integration. Tool prefixing (mcp_<server>_<tool>), OAuth 2.1 PKCE, per-server tool filtering.

wal_protocol.description: ILMA WAL Protocol (Write-Ahead Logging) — Capture corrections, proper nouns, preferences, decisions BEFORE responding. Prevents context loss of critical details. Trigger is human's INPUT, not agent's memory.
wal_protocol.note: Write to SESSION-STATE.md first, THEN respond. Part of ClawHub integration Phase 15.

working_buffer.description: ILMA Working Buffer Protocol — Survive the danger zone between memory flush and compaction. At 60% context, log every exchange to memory/working-buffer.md. File survives truncation. Recovery tool.
working_buffer.note: memory/working-buffer.md survives context truncation. Read FIRST after compaction.

compaction_recovery.description: ILMA Compaction Recovery — Step-by-step recovery when context gets truncated. Auto-trigger on summary tags, 'truncated', 'where were we?'. Steps: buffer → SESSION-STATE → daily notes → unified search.
compaction_recovery.note: Don't ask 'what were we doing?' — buffer has the conversation.

self_improvement_system.description: ILMA Self-Improvement System — .learnings/ directory with LEARNINGS.md, ERRORS.md, FEATURE_REQUESTS.md. ID format LRN/ERR/FEAT-YYYYMMDD-XXX. Priority tags, promotion workflow, detection triggers.

security_hardening.description: ILMA Security Hardening — Skill vetting (~26% vulnerabilities), no external agent networks, context leakage prevention, VFM scoring before self-modification (score >= 50), ADL Protocol (Stability > Novelty).
security_hardening.note: Relentless resourcefulness (10 approaches), Verify Before Reporting (VBR).

free_research_pipeline.description: ILMA Free Research Pipeline — 100% free alternative to Firecrawl/Tavily/Exa. Native web search (Mojeek+arXiv+Bing), BeautifulSoup scraping, sitemap discovery, structured extraction, heuristic summarization, batch crawling, competitor analysis.
free_research_pipeline.note: 1,324 lines, integrated with existing ilma_free_search.py and ilma_free_webfetch.py

wal_automation.description: ILMA WAL Automation — Write-Ahead Logging for context preservation. Auto-logs corrections, proper nouns, preferences, decisions BEFORE responding. 60% context danger zone detection. Thread-safe buffer with auto-flush.
wal_automation.source: ILMA Phase 16 Implementation + ClawHub proactive-agent WAL pattern

self_improve_loop.description: ILMA Self-Improve Loop — Automated self-improvement scanning .learnings/ directory (LEARNINGS.md, ERRORS.md, FEATURE_REQUESTS.md), scoring P1-P3 priority, generating upgrade recommendations, integration with auto-evolution engine.
self_improve_loop.source: ILMA Phase 16 Implementation + ClawHub self-improving-agent pattern

capability_health_dashboard.description: ILMA Capability Health Dashboard — Real-time system health scan. Capability matrix (implemented vs documented vs missing), script inventory (importability), skill coverage (SSS vs regular vs empty), runtime status (services, ports, cron), memory/disk health, gap analysis, ASCII dashboard, JSON export.

phase17_350file_execution.description: Ability to expand codebase to 350+ purposeful files with all tests passing

judge_system.name: Judge System (L10 Evaluator)
judge_system.description: Independent evaluator that verifies if a solution ACTUALLY SOLVES the problem. 10-level verification from L1 (compile) to L10 (judge).

actor_critic_core.notes: Asymmetric triad: Actor/Critic/Judge with temperature control. Based on Gemini multi-agent architecture.
actor_critic_core.evidence_note: 29 tests PASS, all modules compile and import

reflexion_loop.notes: Self-correction cycle: Judge finds error -> ILMA fixes -> lesson extracted. Based on Gemini Reflexion pattern.

mae_triplet.notes: Multi-Agent Evolve: Proposer -> Solver -> Judge -> loop. No human needed for evolution.

trajectory_evolution.notes: SE-Agent: Revision fixes failure node, Recombination cross-breeds trajectories, Refinement removes redundancies.

rcr_pattern.notes: Reflect-Critique-Refine: Adversarial debate where Critic finds flaws (NOT solutions). Increases accuracy 8.92%.

long_term_memory.notes: Lesson extraction and retrieval. Uses SQLite FTS5. Extracts lesson when Judge forces ILMA to fix approach.

partner_wrappers.notes: Prometheus-2 (Judge) and DeepSeek-R1 (Critic) interface wrappers. Placeholder implementations.
